case_title: JB ROOFING COMPANY vs. FRALEY, LEWIS et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-01-1993, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-01-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-03-1993 CONTINUED FROM OCT-01-1993 TO NOV-03-1993 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-03-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-03-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525. HEARING SET FOR DEC-03-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JB ROOFING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT FRALEY, LEWIS DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-17-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-18-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-28-1993
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-17-1993, CONTINUED TO OCT-01-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE AND STATUS REPORT. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
